subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter addressed to His Holiness, him who hath ascended unto God, the honoured Manshádí, hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه آنجناب که بحضرت متصاعد الی الله جناب منشادی مرقوم نموده
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @business; financial; property matters, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement
